description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush landscaping, including numerous trees and shrubs. The structure features a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors opening onto a backyard patio and swimming pool. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes amenities such as lounge chairs, a play structure, and a paved walkway. The front yard is landscaped with manicured bushes and a driveway leading to the entrance. The property is bordered by sidewalks and a street, integrating it into a suburban neighborhood context. The overall design is modern and open, with an emphasis on outdoor living spaces and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and play area. Surrounded by trees and a wooden fence, it blends contemporary design with outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, manicured front yard, and driveway with dense tree coverage.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the backyard pool, lounge area, play structure, and wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear facade with large glass doors opening to the pool and patio, surrounded by trees and fencing.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, patio, play area, and the connection to the street and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped rear windows and smaller front windows
